# Summary

Briefly describe what this change does and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor or cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build, CI, or tooling

## How tested

Describe what you ran. For example:

- [ ] Backend tests (`cd backend && uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Backend lint (`uv run ruff check .`)
- [ ] Android unit tests (`./gradlew :shared:testAndroidHostTest`)
- [ ] Android debug build (`./gradlew :androidApp:assembleDebug`)
- [ ] Ran on an emulator or device
- [ ] iOS build from `mobile/iosApp` in Xcode

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean (for backend changes)
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or credentials are committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] I followed the project style, including no em dashes or en dashes

## Linked issue

Closes #
